commit.message:
fix: show all marketplaces (registered + cache-only), enable delete for both (#118)

## Root cause

\config.json\ only has \office-coding-agent\ registered. All other cache
dirs (\mcaps-microsoft--SPT-IQ\, \stbrnner_microsoft--SPT-IQ\,
\gency-*\) were cloned by the CLI during browsing but never registered.
v0.5.15 accidentally hid them entirely.

## Changes

- **\listMarketplaces()\**: Returns registered entries AND cache-only
dirs (registeredKey=null)
- **\ emoveMarketplace(cacheDir, slug, registeredKey)\**: Registered →
CLI unregister + rmSync cache dir; cache-only → rmSync only
- **Delete button**: Visible for all \!isBuiltIn && !isOwn\ entries — no
\ egisteredKey\ guard
- **\pluginService.ts\**: \postJson\ body type widened to allow \
ull\ values
- **Tests**: 28 tests — cache-only entries ARE listed; cache-only delete
works; delete button shown when \ egisteredKey\ is null

Co-authored-by: Stefan Broenner <stefan.broenner@microsoft.comm>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: office-coding-agent
repository.description: An Office add-in that embeds GitHub Copilot as an AI assistant in Excel, PowerPoint and Word (and other Office hosts). Uses the Copilot SDK.

commit.message:
fix(api): update package_id on user profile when subscription plan changes

The subscription-updated webhook processor was updating paddle_price_id
on indb_payment_subscriptions but never resolving which package it
belonged to. The user's indb_auth_user_profiles.package_id stayed stale,
so the frontend still showed the old plan after upgrade/downgrade.

Now resolves the new package by scanning pricing_tiers for the matching
paddle_price_id and updates both indb_payment_subscriptions.package_id
and indb_auth_user_profiles.package_id.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(ac): auto-resume only most recent interrupted session per project [skip deploy]

Prevents relaunching all interrupted AC sessions on restart (which creates
multiple concurrent cycles). Now uses DISTINCT ON project_id to resume
only the latest session per project, with SQLite GROUP BY fallback.

commit.message:
Replace `@template` with `@inheritParams` for shared roxygen documentation (#1066)

This fixes #814 with some behind-the-scenes cleanup that reduces the number of files and shortens the documentation section of others.

* Replace @template roxygen directives with @inheritParams r4ss_params

- Create R/params.R with internal r4ss_params() function documenting all
  shared parameters previously held in man-roxygen/ templates
- Replace all #' @template <name> lines across 102 R files with
  #' @inheritParams r4ss_params, collapsing multiple @template lines per
  roxygen block into a single @inheritParams line
- Handle special cases: mcmc.out.R and mcmc.nuisance.R use inline @param
  file with posteriors-specific docs; SS_fitbiasramp.R uses actual
  @references entry in place of @template methot2011cjfas
- Remove man-roxygen/ directory (no longer needed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: minor improvements to params.R based on code review

Co-authored-by: iantaylor-NOAA <4992918+iantaylor-NOAA@users.noreply.github.com>

* style and docs: run devtools::document() and style with styler or air

commit.message:
fix(ac): isolation responsabilités — watchdog, skills, system_prompts

watchdog scan_ac_issues(): supprime détections projet (Chromium, build no-op)
→ ne détecte que les bugs SF (.ts contient HTML = bug skill ac-codex)

ac-codex system_prompt + skill: règles extensions fichiers absolues
→ .ts = TypeScript only, HTML → index.html, docker_deploy() obligatoire
→ si deploy fail → corriger Dockerfile PROJET, jamais deploy/Dockerfile SF

ac-qa-agent system_prompt + skill: procédure récupération Chromium
→ Chromium absent → ajouter RUN npx playwright install dans Dockerfile PROJET
→ relancer docker_deploy() + retry screenshots (responsabilité agent, pas SF)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-reconnect to healthy peer when active masternode goes down

Every 5s peer discovery re-probes all peers. Previously the active
client was only set on first connection (client.is_none()). Now, if
the active peer is no longer healthy in the latest probe results the
wallet immediately switches to the best available healthy peer,
restarts the WS connection, and refreshes balance data.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: clip filter output to filter region to prevent feFlood bleeding (#131)

Filter primitives like feFlood fill the entire sourceGraphic canvas,
causing each filtered element's output to overwrite previous elements
when composited. Fix by clipping the filter result to the SVG filter
region (element bbox + 10% default, or explicit filter attributes)
before compositing back onto the main canvas.

Also supports filterUnits='userSpaceOnUse' and explicit x/y/width/height
on the <filter> element for custom filter regions.

Fixes #130

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: enhanced feedback workflow with GitHub issue creation (#156)

* Enhanced feedback workflow with GitHub issue creation

When a user submits /feedback, the bot now:
1. Saves feedback to new user_feedback table (text, media flags, message ID)
2. Forwards to admins (existing behavior preserved)
3. Creates a GitHub issue labeled 'user-feedback' (best-effort)
4. Assigns the Product Manager agent to triage the issue

New components:
- V12 migration: user_feedback table with FK to user, indexes, grants
- GitHubService: GitHub REST API client for issue creation and agent assignment
- GitHubConfiguration type and env vars (GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_REPO)
- DbService: SaveUserFeedback, UpdateFeedbackGitHubIssue methods

commit.message:
fix: END_SESSION routing + OTPK soft-delete

END_SESSION routing (messaging-service):
- In GetPendingMessages and convert_kafka_envelope_to_proto, "END_SESSION"
  payload was falling through to ContentType::E2eeSignal — client tried to
  decrypt it as a Double Ratchet message and failed silently
- Map "END_SESSION" → ContentType::SessionReset (same as SESSION_RESET)
- Send empty encrypted_payload for all SessionReset/KeySync control messages
  so client cannot accidentally pass the ASCII type string to decryption

OTPK soft-delete (key-service + migration 027):
- replace_existing=true previously hard-deleted all OTPKs immediately
- Now marks them is_expired=true with expired_at=NOW() (soft-delete)
- GetPreKeyBundle queries skip expired keys (AND is_expired = false)
- get_prekey_count only counts active keys
- New cleanup_expired_otpks() hard-deletes after 48-hour TTL (same pattern
  as signed_prekey_archive)
- Migration 027 adds is_expired/expired_at columns + partial indexes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix GL context NULL on Xvfb/Mesa: add XSync before make_current() (#361)

* Initial plan

* Fix GL context NULL on Xvfb/Mesa: add XSync before make_current()

On Xvfb with Mesa's software renderer (llvmpipe), glXMakeCurrent returns
True but glGetString(GL_VERSION) returns NULL because Fl::check() processes
FLTK events but does NOT call XSync.  Without XSync, the X server's
XMapWindow command (issued internally by show()) is still pending when
make_current() calls glXMakeCurrent.  Mesa accepts the binding (returns
True) but cannot allocate the back buffer for an unmapped window, leaving
GL non-functional.

Fix: add XSync(fl_display, False) after show()+Fl::check() and before
make_current() in two places:
- FLTKContextManager::ensureWindow() in fltk_context_manager.h
- ObolViewerWindow::primeGLContexts() in obol_viewer.cpp

This mirrors the pattern in headless_utils.h which calls
XMapWindow -> XSync(dpy, False) before glXCreateContext, and which
reliably initialises GL on Xvfb/Mesa in CI.

Verified with OBOL_GL_DIAG=1: GL_VERSION now shows
"4.5 (Compatibility Profile) Mesa 25.2.8" at every diagnostic checkpoint
instead of NULL.  All 198 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: starseeker <238416+starseeker@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: starseeker <238416+starseeker@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(firmware): fix undefined behavior in I2C reads and eliminate heap fragmentation

  uint8_t temporaries before combining into int16_t values
- Replace String() heap allocations with stack-based dtostrf() + char buffer
  to prevent SRAM fragmentation on Arduino Uno (2KB SRAM)
- No hardware pin assignments modified

commit.message:
fix(ac): auto-resume interrupted AC sessions on platform restart

On restart, orphaned 'active' sessions are marked 'interrupted'. AC cycles
(sessions with config.ac=True) now re-launch via _run_workflow_background
with resume_from=workflow_checkpoint so interrupted cycles continue from
where they left off instead of being permanently lost.

Only sessions interrupted in the last 24h are resumed, with 2s stagger.

[skip deploy]
